top_signals.title: Brent crude rises 2% as U.S. military strikes against Iran cloud Middle East peace prospects
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump also said negotiations with Iran were "proceeding nicely," but cautioned that the U.S. could resume military action if discussions were to collapse.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
